originalTitle: Madonna & Sabrina Carpenter - Bring Your Love (Official Video)
content: You're watching the official music video for 'Bring Your Love' by Madonna & Sabrina Carpenter. Original song taken from Madonna's Confessions On A Dance Floor: Part II, out July 3 2026. - Stream ‘Bring Your Love’ now: https://madonna.lnk.to/bringyourlove - Pre-Order Confessions On A Dance Floor: Part II: https://Madonna.lnk.to/Confessions2 Subscribe to the Madonna Channel! https://Madonna.lnk.to/YouTubeID Check out the Official Madonna YouTube Playlists… The Complete Madonna Videography https://Madonna.lnk.to/Videography Live Performances https://Madonna.lnk.to/LiveYT Help Us Give Back… Raising Malawi http://www.raisingmalawi.org/ The Ray of Light Foundation http://www.rayoflight.org/ Stay in touch with Madonna… https://madonna.com https://instagram.com/madonna https://tiktok.com/@madonna https://x.com/madonna https://facebook.com/madonna https://www.madonna.com/newsletter Lyrics: Ask yourself this What are you doing it for? Is it for you? Is it for them? I got something I wanna talk about Don’t comment on my ideas I don’t want your judgment or your expectations Don’t wind me up like a toy Your vision of me is a killer of joy I know where the bodies are buried Don’t try to shut me up Don’t try to distract me with numbers I did it all for love Bring your love Cause you cannot shake me Bring your love Cause you’ll never break me Bring your love Cause you cannot take me down Don’t rely on my moral compass On my discretion, I have a confession Don’t shove your fears down my throat Before I can speak, I can’t even breathe I know where the bodies are buried Don’t try to shut me up Don’t try to distract me with numbers I did it all for love Bring your love Cause you cannot shake me Bring your love Cause you’ll never break me Bring your love Cause you cannot take me down Bring your love Cause you cannot shake me Bring your love Cause you’ll never break me Bring your love Cause you cannot take me down Don’t wanna compromise I made the sacrifice I always pay the price And now I don’t wanna. Don’t wanna I have a confession I did it all for love Bring your love Cause you cannot shake me Bring your love Cause you’ll never break me Bring your love Cause you cannot take me down Bring your love CREDITS: Directed by TORSO Edited by Danny Tull Sabrina Carpenter’s Stylist: Jared Ellner Sabrina Carpenter’s Mua: Carolina Gonzalez Sabrina Carpenter’s Hair Stylist: Evanie Frausto Madonna's Stylist: Rita Melssen Madonna’s Mua: Marcelo Gutierrez Madonna‘s Hair Stylist: Matt Benns Madonna’s Body Double: Mattie Love Sabrina Carpenter’s Body Double: Gaynor Hicks Sabrina Carpenter’s Choreographer: Jasmine Badie Rave Choreographer: Megan Lawson Rave Scene Movement Director: Nicolas Huchard Choreographer Assistants: Damien Jalet, Sierra Herrera, Zoe Hollinshead Dancers: Kupono Aweau, Chaz Buzan, Derrell Bullock, Sierra Herrera, Sasha Mallory, Marvin Gofin The Madonna Channel is the official YouTube home for Madonna. As the best-selling female recording artist of all time, Madonna continues to leave an indelible mark on the world through her art, music, activism and humanitarian leadership. Madonna consistently pushes boundaries, spurs conversations and unites us all through her revolutionary work. Subscribe for the latest videos, music, news and updates. Enjoy Madonna’s groundbreaking music videos, live performances, humorous videos and more.
chineseContent: 您正在观看麦当娜和萨布丽娜·卡彭特的《Bring Your Love》官方音乐视频。原创歌曲取自麦当娜的《Confessions On A Dance Floor: Part II》，于 2026 年 7 月 3 日发行。 - 立即串流“Bring Your Love”：https://madonna.lnk.to/bringyourlove - 预订《Confessions On A Dance Floor: Part II》：https://Madonna.lnk.to/Confessions2 订阅麦当娜频道！ https://Madonna.lnk.to/YouTubeID 查看麦当娜官方 YouTube 播放列表...完整的麦当娜视频 https://Madonna.lnk.to/Videography 现场表演 https://Madonna.lnk.to/LiveYT 帮助我们回馈...提高马拉维 http://www.raisemalawi.org/ 光之射线基金会 http://www.rayoflight.org/ 与麦当娜保持联系... https://madonna.com https://instagram.com/madonna https://tiktok.com/@madonna https://x.com/madonna https://facebook.com/madonna https://www.madonna.com/newsletter 歌词：问问自己，你这样做是为了什么？适合你吗？是为了他们吗？我有一些我想说的事情 不要评论我的想法 我不需要你的判断或你的期望 不要像玩具一样把我缠住 你对我的看法是快乐的杀手 我知道尸体埋在哪里 不要试图让我闭嘴 不要试图用数字来分散我的注意力 我所做的一切都是为了爱 带上你的爱 因为你无法动摇我 带上你的爱 因为你永远不会击垮我 带上你的爱 因为你无法打倒我 不要依赖我的道德指南针 根据我的判断，我有一个坦白 别把你的恐惧塞进我的喉咙 在我能说话之前，我什至无法呼吸 我知道尸体埋在哪里 别试图让我闭嘴 别试图用数字分散我的注意力 我所做的一切都是为了爱 带上你的爱 因为你无法动摇我 带上你的爱 因为你永远不会击垮我 带上你的爱 因为你无法击垮我 带上
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
